system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

This ancient Technique is known to only a few Zun Tribesmen in the Banyan region. You rapidly tap meridians on your foe’s fingertip and armpit causing one of their five Phoenix Spirits to overwhelm the others, producing strange behavior. Make an Arm Strike against Parry. If you succeed then a Phoenix Spirit of your choosing is disrupted for ten minutes per Rank of Dianxue. On a Total Success the duration doubles. The victim must take the Missing Phoenix Spirit flaw (using the disrupted entry) while under the effects of the Technique. Cathartic: The same except this effect lasts for one day per Rank of Dianxue.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: Chosen Phoenix Spirit is disrupted for 10 minutes per Rank of Dianxue; apply corresponding Missing Phoenix Spirit flaw while active
system.totalSuccessTargetEffects: Chosen Phoenix Spirit is disrupted for 20 minutes per Rank of Dianxue; apply corresponding Missing Phoenix Spirit flaw while active
system.catharticTargetEffects: Chosen Phoenix Spirit is disrupted for 1 day per Rank of Dianxue; apply corresponding Missing Phoenix Spirit flaw while active
system.catharticEffect: The same except this effect lasts for one day per Rank of Dianxue.
